metaTitle: The Boeing Atmosphere Global Documentation Hub - Contribute to Atmosphere

header.title: Contribute to Atmosphere
header.description: From job openings to collaboration projects, learn about how to get involved

sections.text:
Contribute a component

We're keen to find out how we can expand the design system to meet your needs. Whether your team uses Angular or custom-built components, feel free to contact us about adding them to Atmosphere.

Requesting a component

Atmosphere is a global design system intended to serve all teams who build DAS solutions. To make sure that Atmosphere components are applicable to multiple products, we carefully evaluate all component requests.

Before you submit a request for a component, check whether it meets the following requirements:

  • Global and generic - the component is useful to multiple teams and designed without product-specific functionality
  • Flexible and adaptable - product teams can seamlessly integrate the component into their apps
  • Simple and straightforward - the component is free from unnecessary complexity and has a limited amount of variants

Collaborate with us

If you're interested in working with the Atmosphere team, you can get involved in multiple ways:

  • Demos - get detailed information about the Atmosphere capabilities and strategy
  • Job openings and working groups - find opportunities to join the team
  • Projects - if you'd like to collaborate, send us your ideas
  • Testing - help us to continuously improve Atmosphere

To learn more about getting involved, send us a message.

Get in touch

To discuss collaboration opportunities or learn more about contributing components to Atmosphere, contact jurrien.vanberkum@boeing.com or reach out to us on the Atmosphere Slack Channels:
items: #designsystem-ux for UX and design questions
sections.name: Email Jurriën Van Berkum
